title: Settings
pageSubtitle: Manage your app behavior, healthcare preferences, notifications, and privacy.

messages.pushNotSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
messages.pushBlocked: Push permission is blocked. You can enable it from browser settings.
messages.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.
messages.passwordMustDiffer: New password must be different from current password.
messages.passwordChangeFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose light, dark, or system mode. Theme changes apply instantly across Medora.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Control how and when Medora sends medical reminders and care updates.

inApp.title: In-App Notifications
inApp.description: Receive alerts in your Medora dashboard.

email.title: Email Notifications
email.description: Appointment and prescription updates by email.

labResults.title: Lab Results
labResults.description: Notify when test results are ready.

prescriptionUpdates.title: Prescription Updates
prescriptionUpdates.description: Status updates for newly issued prescriptions.

careTips.title: Health Care Tips
careTips.description: Personalized wellness and preventive care updates.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Preferences
healthcare.description: Keep emergency and care-related preferences ready for faster support.

dosageAlerts.title: Dosage Alerts
dosageAlerts.description: Extra alerts if medication is delayed.

fastingMedicationAlerts.title: Fasting Medication Alerts
fastingMedicationAlerts.description: Reminder cues for before/after meal instructions.

menstrualHealthReminders.title: Menstrual Health Reminders
menstrualHealthReminders.description: Cycle and symptom logging reminder nudges.

privacyAndApp.title: Privacy, Security & App
privacyAndApp.description: Secure your account and tailor experience for readability and comfort.

biometricLock.title: Biometric App Lock
biometricLock.description: Require fingerprint/face unlock on supported devices.

hideSensitiveContent.title: Hide Sensitive Notification Content
hideSensitiveContent.description: Only show generic text on lock screen-style notifications.

verifiedDoctorsOnly.title: Verified Doctors Access Only
verifiedDoctorsOnly.description: Share profile data only with verified doctors.

anonymousResearch.title: Anonymous Research Contribution
anonymousResearch.description: Allow anonymized data for healthcare improvement studies.

compactMode.title: Compact Mode
compactMode.description: Reduce spacing to fit more content on one screen.

largeText.title: Large Text
largeText.description: Increase text size for better readability.

password.title: Change Password
password.description: Update your account password. You'll need to enter your current password first.
